description: Research-only deployment release for a TCGA/GDC STAR-Counts-scale bulk RNA-seq tumor-vs-adjacent-normal classifier, with fail-closed input and model contracts, input QC, scoring, threshold calibration, explanations, reproducible training and validation entry points, and deterministic release validation. The public scoring library API is 3.0.0.
notes: Validated input boundary: GDC STAR-Counts-style log2(TPM+1) bulk RNA-seq matrices for TCGA/CPTAC-like tumor-vs-adjacent-normal contrasts. tumor_probability is a model logistic score, not clinical risk or a diagnostic probability. Cohort adaptation is disabled by default and is an explicit, transductive, composition-dependent opt-in. Calibration summaries are apparent/resubstitution estimates on the same labeled samples. Committed external-validation metrics are a historical snapshot; cache/provenance fixes have not yet been followed by a live-network rerun. Direct hard calls on Toil/RSEM, GTEx, GEO, raw counts, FPKM, microarray, single-cell, or spatial data are not validated without pipeline-specific recalibration or refitting.
title: TCGA/GDC tumor-vs-normal RNA-seq classifier
